title: On Receiving Heyne�s Virgil From Mr. Hayley.
content:
I should have deem�d it once an effort vain
    To sweeten more sweet Maro�s matchless strain,
    But from that error now behold me free,
    Since I received him as a gift from thee.

This evocative piece by William Cowper, titled "On Receiving Heyne�s Virgil From Mr. Hayley.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...
